creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175062
Add openssl/opensslconf.h to the includes in _ssl.c

Building lang/python27 fails when:

  - DEFAULT_VERSIONS contains ssl=openssl

  - security/openssl options has SSLv3 support disabled

The problem is that the header containing the definition of OPENSSL_NO_SSL3 is not being included.

Thanks to brnrd@ for being able to diagnose the problem pretty much instantaneously.

poudriere testbuilds on 10.1-RELEASE amd64, 10.1-RELEASE i386, 9.3-RELEASE amd64 and 9.3-RELEASE i386 succeed.
